title: Implement API Management
summary: Learn how the API Management service functions, how to transform and secure APIs, and how to create a backend API.

sections.title: Implement API Management
sections.summary: Learn how the API Management service functions, how to transform and secure APIs, and how to create a backend API.

lessons.title: Explore API Management
lessons.content_md:
Learn how the API Management service functions, how to transform and secure APIs, and how to create a backend API.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-api-management/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement API Management
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement API Management**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
